TYPHOID AGGLUTININ REACTION IN A CASE OF EPIDEMIC CEREBROSPINAL MENINGITIS
UNDIAGNOSTICATED BRAIN ABSCESS
abstractSnippet: InThe Journalof May 22, 1909, Dr. Eshner reported a case of undiagnosticated brain abscess.

title: William Wotherspoon Ireland
abstractSnippet: Dr. Ireland, who was so familiar a figure at the meetings of the Edinburgh Medical Societies, and so well known through his writings, died at his home in Musselburgh on the 17th May 1909, at the age of 76.
